# Shipping Policy

Last updated: 4/15/2026

## 1. Shipping Information

We are committed to delivering your KLARSKIN products quickly and safely. Orders are typically processed and dispatched within 1 business day.

## 2. Shipping Costs

Shipping costs are calculated based on your location and order value:

*   **Free Shipping:** Orders over €50 qualify for free standard shipping
*   **Standard Shipping:** €4.95 for orders under €50
*   **Express Shipping:** €9.95 (1-2 business days)

## 3. Delivery Times

Estimated delivery times by region:

*   **Germany:** 2-3 business days
*   **EU Countries:** 4-7 business days
*   **International:** 7-14 business days

Please note that delivery times are estimates and may vary during peak seasons or due to unforeseen circumstances.

## 4. Subscription Shipments

For subscription orders, shipments are automatically sent according to your chosen delivery frequency (every 30, 60, or 120 days). You will receive an email notification before each shipment is processed.

Subscription shipments include free shipping on all orders.

## 5. Order Tracking

Once your order has been dispatched, you will receive a shipping confirmation email with a tracking number. You can use this number to track your package's progress.

## 6. Shipping Restrictions

Currently, we ship to most European countries. If your country is not listed at checkout, please contact us at [info@klarskin.com](mailto:info@klarskin.com) to inquire about shipping options.

## 7. Customs and Import Duties

For international orders outside the EU, customs duties and import taxes may apply. These charges are the responsibility of the recipient and are not included in our shipping costs.

## 8. Shipping Issues

If your order is delayed, damaged, or lost during shipping, please contact our customer service team at [info@klarskin.com](mailto:info@klarskin.com). We will work with you to resolve the issue promptly.

## 9. Address Changes

If you need to change your shipping address, please contact us immediately. We can only modify addresses before the order has been dispatched. Once shipped, address changes cannot be made.

## 10. Contact Us

For any questions about shipping, please contact us at:

Email: [info@klarskin.com](mailto:info@klarskin.com)

# Privacy Policy

## 1. Controller and Data Protection Officer

## 2. General Information on Data Processing

### 2.1 Scope of Personal Data Processing

We process personal data of our users only to the extent necessary to provide a functional website, our content, and services. The processing of personal data of our users takes place regularly only with the consent of the user. An exception applies in cases where prior consent cannot be obtained for factual reasons and the processing of the data is permitted by law.

### 2.2 Legal Basis for Personal Data Processing

We process your personal data based on the following legal bases:

*   **Art. 6 (1) lit. a GDPR** - Consent for specific purposes (e.g., newsletter)
*   **Art. 6 (1) lit. b GDPR** - Contract performance (e.g., order processing)
*   **Art. 6 (1) lit. c GDPR** - Legal obligations (e.g., tax requirements)
*   **Art. 6 (1) lit. f GDPR** - Legitimate interests (e.g., fraud prevention, analytics)

## 3. Data We Collect

We may collect and process the following categories of personal data:

### 3.1 Data Provided by You

*   **Account Data:** Name, email address, password (encrypted)
*   **Order Data:** Billing address, shipping address, payment information
*   **Contact Data:** Email, phone number (if provided)
*   **Communication Data:** Messages sent through contact forms or email

### 3.2 Automatically Collected Data

*   **Technical Data:** IP address, browser type and version, device type, operating system
*   **Usage Data:** Pages visited, time and date of visit, referring website, click behavior
*   **Cookie Data:** See section 7 for detailed cookie information

## 4. Purposes of Data Processing

We use your personal data for the following purposes:

*   Order Processing: To process and deliver your orders (Art. 6 (1) lit. b GDPR)
*   Customer Service: To respond to inquiries and provide support (Art. 6 (1) lit. b GDPR)
*   Payment Processing: To process payments securely (Art. 6 (1) lit. b GDPR)
*   Marketing: To send promotional emails with your consent (Art. 6 (1) lit. a GDPR)
*   Website Improvement: To analyze usage and improve our services (Art. 6 (1) lit. f GDPR)
*   Legal Compliance: To comply with legal obligations such as tax law (Art. 6 (1) lit. c GDPR)
*   Fraud Prevention: To protect against fraudulent activities (Art. 6 (1) lit. f GDPR)

## 5. Third-Party Data Processors and Data Recipients

We share your data with the following service providers to fulfill our contractual obligations:
